prompt_text: Best AI visibility infrastructure for B2B SaaS brands
response:
# AI Visibility Infrastructure for B2B SaaS Brands

## What "AI Visibility" Means
Getting your brand cited, recommended, and referenced by AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) when buyers ask relevant questions.

---

## Core Infrastructure Stack

### 1. **Content & Knowledge Layer**
- Comprehensive, authoritative long-form content (guides, comparisons, use cases)
- Structured data / schema markup (FAQ, HowTo, Organization)
- Clear entity definition (who you are, what you do, who you serve)
- Wikipedia/Wikidata presence for brand legitimacy

### 2. **Citation & Reference Building**
- **G2, Capterra, Trustpilot** — heavily crawled by AI systems
- **Reddit threads** in relevant subreddits (r/SaaS, niche communities)
- **Quora answers** with genuine expertise
- **Industry publications** (TechCrunch, Forbes, niche trade press)
- **Podcast appearances** with transcripts published online

### 3. **Technical Foundation**
- Clean, crawlable site architecture
- LLMs.txt file (emerging standard for AI crawler guidance)
- Fast load times + mobile optimization
- Semantic HTML and clear topical clustering

### 4. **Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)**
- Target question-based queries your buyers ask AI
- Build "best [category] tools" style content
- Create comparison pages (You vs. Competitor)
- Publish original research/data AI systems love to cite

### 5. **Monitoring & Measurement**
- **Brandwatch / Mention** — track brand mentions
- **Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini** — manual prompt testing
- **Profound** — purpose-built AI visibility tracking
- **Otterly.AI** — monitor AI search mentions
- **Share of Model** tracking (% of relevant AI responses mentioning you)

---

## Priority Actions by Stage

| Stage | Focus |
|-------|-------|
| Early | Entity establishment, G2 reviews, core content |
| Growth | Citation building, Reddit presence, original data |
| Scale | AEO content program, AI monitoring tools, PR |

---

## Key Principle
> AI systems recommend brands they've seen **consistently cited by trusted sources** — not just brands with good websites.

---

**Tools worth exploring:**
- [Profound](https://www.profound.com) — AI visibility analytics
- [Otterly.AI](https://otterly.ai) — AI mention monitoring
- [Schema
